---
pagetitle: "Robert Shaw"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="landing-hero" aria-labelledby="landing-title">
  <div class="landing-hero__bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="landing-hero__inner">
    <p class="landing-eyebrow">Welcome</p>
    <h1 id="landing-title" class="landing-title">Robert Shaw</h1>
    <p class="landing-tagline">
      My personal website.
    </p>
    <div class="landing-actions">
      <a class="landing-btn landing-btn--primary" href="#highlights">Explore</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="landing-band" id="highlights" aria-labelledby="highlights-heading">
  <div class="landing-wrap">
    <h2 id="highlights-heading" class="landing-section-title">What you'll find here</h2>
    <p class="landing-section-lead">Hit one of the tiles below to find out a little bit about me, view my CV, look at some of my past projects, and learn about some of my hobbies.</p>
    <div class="landing-cards" role="list">
      <a class="landing-card-link" href="about.html" role="listitem" aria-label="Go to About me page">
        <article class="landing-card">
          <div class="landing-card__accent" aria-hidden="true"></div>
          <h3 class="landing-card__title">About me</h3>
          <p class="landing-card__text">A little bit more about me including how to contact me.</p>
        </article>
      </a>
      <article class="landing-card" role="listitem">
        <div class="landing-card__accent" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        <h3 class="landing-card__title">Code &amp; projects</h3>
        <p class="landing-card__text">Explore some of my past projects.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="landing-card" role="listitem">
        <div class="landing-card__accent" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        <h3 class="landing-card__title">Hobbies</h3>
        <p class="landing-card__text">Click here to take a look at my hobbies and interests.</p>
      </article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
